description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing MFA challenge entities, providing database access methods related to MFA challenges.

classes.name: MfaChallengeRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for performing database operations on MFA challenge entities.

methods.name: findFirstByUserIdAndConsumedAtIsNullAndExpiresAtAfterOrderByCreatedAtDesc
methods.description: Finds the most recent MFA challenge for a user that has not been consumed and has not expired.
